headline: McKesson Taps AI Personalization To Support Loyalty And Long Term Growth
summary: McKesson (NYSE:MCK) is adopting Exchange Solutions' loyalty and personalization platform as it updates its customer engagement approach. The move is designed to use AI driven decisioning and real time personalization while keeping McKesson's core systems intact. This modernization is aimed at supporting enterprise clients with faster program changes and more tailored interactions. For investors watching NYSE:MCK at a share price of $860.16, this technology shift sits alongside a long...

headline: How The McKesson (MCK) Narrative Is Shifting With Biosimilars Execution And Richer Valuation
summary: McKesson's fair value estimate has shifted only slightly, moving from about US$995.27 to about US$997.67 per share, while recent Street price targets cluster higher in the US$1,040 to US$1,050 range. Analysts are linking those upper tier targets to execution around biosimilars, co-manufacturing, and specialty distribution, while also pointing out where expectations could be getting full. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and what to watch as the McKesson story...
